name: AlbaRoyal cosmetic chair
shortDescription: White-gold luxury cosmetic chair with ergonomic backrest. Adjustable height (49–62 cm), 360° swivel seat, castered star base.
description:
The AlbaRoyal cosmetic chair belongs to the premium category of salon furniture, providing a truly exclusive look with the combination of clean white upholstery and elegant gold details.

The saddle-shaped, contoured seat and ergonomic backrest ensure ideal posture even during extended use. Height is adjustable from 49–62 cm with a gas spring lift mechanism, and the 360° swivel seat provides maximum mobility.

Second Category classification: minor aesthetic imperfections may occur (small scratches or slight discoloration on gold parts), however these do not affect functionality or durability.
metaTitle: AlbaRoyal cosmetic chair | White-gold luxury salon chair
metaDescription: AlbaRoyal white-gold cosmetic chair. Ergonomic, adjustable height 49–62 cm, swivel, durable faux leather. Available at outlet price.

featureRows.headline: Why is the AlbaRoyal the best choice?
featureRows.subtitle: Elegance, comfort, and excellent value for money

features.title: Ergonomic design for your comfort
features.description: The saddle-shaped, contoured seat and ergonomic backrest protect the back and increase comfort even during long working hours. The gas spring height adjustment (49–62 cm) is easily customizable.
features.highlight: Ergonomics that protect your back all day.

features.title: Exclusive white-gold design
features.description: The combination of clean white faux leather upholstery and gold-colored metal details radiates elegance and cleanliness. The AlbaRoyal fits perfectly into modern, premium salons.
features.highlight: White-gold harmony that elevates the salon's prestige.

features.title: Excellent value for money
features.description: Thanks to the Second Category classification, the AlbaRoyal offers premium quality at a discounted price. Any minor aesthetic imperfections do not affect functionality or durability – comfort and functionality remain unchanged.

testimonials.name: Horváth Tímea
testimonials.text: I love the AlbaRoyal chair! <mark>The white-gold design is gorgeous, and it's incredibly comfortable</mark>. Despite the Second Category classification, I received it in near-perfect condition. Fantastic value for money!

faq.question: What does Second Category classification mean?
faq.answer: Second Category means the chair may have minor aesthetic imperfections, such as small scratches or slight discoloration on the gold parts. These do not affect functionality, comfort, or durability – they are purely cosmetic.

faq.question: Does the chair need assembly?
faq.answer: Minimal assembly is required: attach the casters and gas spring to the star base, then place the seat. It can be done in a few minutes without tools.

faq.question: What material is the upholstery made of?
faq.answer: Durable white faux leather upholstery that is easy to clean and disinfect. It provides a hygienic solution in a professional salon environment.

faq.question: How can the white upholstery be cleaned?
faq.answer: The faux leather surface can be easily wiped down with a damp cloth or surface disinfectant. To preserve the white color, regular cleaning is recommended, and direct contact with dye materials should be avoided.
